title: Shattering Quick Mediterranean Black Pudding Pilaf
description: A lacto-vegetarian-friendly, shattering quick-fix Mediterranean dish featuring black pudding and confit-tomato. Prepares in under 30 minutes with minimal cleanup.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet.
Add sliced red onion and cook for 3 minutes until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add confit-tomatoes, cherry tomatoes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add sliced black pudding and stir to break up clumps.
Cook for 5 minutes until the black pudding is heated through and starts to shatter.
Stir in lemon juice and chopped parsley.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Optional: Serve with crusty bread for a filling snack or light lunch.
Allow bread to toast in the skillet for 1-2 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Transfer toasted bread to a plate and top with the pilaf mixture, scraping the skillet to release any remaining juices.
Garnish with additional parsley and serve hot.
